name: Image generation API research and recommendations
description: Researches image generation APIs and services using Exa search, uses Claude AI to compare providers and recommend the best tools for specific use cases, and posts the analysis to Slack.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the research results

useCase.description: Image generation use case to research (e.g. 'product photography', 'marketing banners', 'social media content', 'logo design')

requirements.description: Specific requirements (e.g. 'must have API access', 'free tier needed', 'high resolution output')

steps.name: Search for image generation APIs and tools with Exa

data.query: best AI image generation API tools 2025 2026 comparison

steps.name: Build Slack Block Kit tool recommendations
